Hi, I'm Harshith Desu

Application Security Engineer with experience across SOC operations, SIEM monitoring, threat detection, incident response, security automation, DevSecOps, and AI security. I build security solutions that reduce noise, speed up investigations, and strengthen enterprise resilience.

View Projects Download Resume Email Me
Role Application Security Engineer
Location Hyderabad, India
Focus SOC, SIEM, AppSec, AI Security
Experience 2+ Years

About Me

I specialize in turning complex security operations into practical, scalable systems. My work spans SIEM detection engineering, threat hunting, incident response, cloud security, application security testing, and secure automation using Python and Bash. I’m especially interested in modern AI security, including GenAI threat modeling, prompt injection testing, and LLM red teaming.

Highlights

Microsoft Sentinel Splunk Threat Hunting Incident Response SAST / DAST / SCA Checkmarx SonarQube Snyk AWS / Azure Python & Bash MITRE ATT&CK OWASP LLM Top 10

Experience

Cyber Security Engineer (Security Operations)

Deloitte USI · Hyderabad, India
Aug 2024 – Present
  • Led SOC L2 operations across Microsoft Sentinel and Splunk for enterprise environments.
  • Reduced mean time to investigate by 35% through incident triage, response, and process execution.
  • Built AI-powered SOC automation workflows using CrewAI and SIEM APIs.
  • Executed application security assessments, secure code reviews, and API security testing.
  • Performed threat modeling using STRIDE and MITRE ATT&CK frameworks.

Security Analyst Trainee

SDI-Bhubaneswar · Bhubaneswar, India
Jan 2024 – Jul 2024
  • Completed advanced SOC operations training in SIEM administration and incident analysis.
  • Performed real-time threat hunting, firewall log analysis, and event correlation.
  • Participated in simulated end-to-end incident response exercises.
  • Analyzed logs for behavioral anomalies and indicators of compromise.

Featured Projects

AI-Powered SOC Automation Platform

Built an autonomous detection and response system using CrewAI, LangChain, SIEM APIs, and security orchestration to automate alert triage, enrichment, and playbook execution.

SIEM Detection Engineering

Developed custom detection rules and correlation queries in Sentinel and Splunk aligned to MITRE ATT&CK for lateral movement, privilege escalation, and exfiltration scenarios.

DevSecOps Pipeline Security

Integrated Checkmarx, SonarQube, Snyk, and container scanning into CI/CD workflows with security quality gates and remediation guidance for engineering teams.

LLM Red Teaming & GenAI Security

Created a methodology to assess prompt injection, jailbreaking, model extraction, and data exfiltration risks using MITRE ATLAS and OWASP LLM Top 10 guidance.
